attributes.description: Volatility — Process Tree (windows.pstree.PsTree). Top: Process Image Distribution donut anchored on process.name. Below: ALL PROCESSES hero (reads as a tree via depth-ordered sort), then 2x2 of insider-threat-focused views (Suspicious Paths, LOLBins, Misplaced System Binaries, Evasive PowerShell) and a full-width strip for No-Command-Line + Remote-Access tools. Source pipeline: 6511-volatility-pstree.conf calls supporting-scripts/volatility-flatten-pstree.rb to flatten the recursive __children tree, then splits each process into its own ES doc.
